zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短期偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
目前XRP/USD价格位于$1.35493附近，较20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)1.36789略低，显示短期多头动能减弱。日内高低点1.36264/1.35044表明市场震荡幅度有限，短线可能继续在1.3500-1.3650区间波动。

MACD指标为-0.00295，负值暗示空方力量略占优势，但信号线未提供，确认趋势仍需谨慎。缺乏RSI数据使超买超卖判断不明，但价格低于SMA20通常提示短期压力存在，投资者应关注趋势反转信号。

支撑位方面，$1.3500为关键心理支撑，若跌破可能加速下行压力；阻力位在$1.3625附近，如突破则可能触发短期反弹。技术面显示，价格在区间下沿获得支撑的概率较高，但仍需警惕回落。

交易建议上，短线可考虑区间操作，低位轻仓买入，高位减仓或获利了结；若价格跌破$1.3500则可考虑观望或短期空单策略。中期仍需等待明显突破信号确认趋势方向。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is currently showing a subtle bearish tilt after failing to maintain momentum above $1.36. The latest price of $1.35493 sits just below the 20-period SMA at $1.36789, signaling that short-term sellers have slight control. The recent intraday high of $1.36264 suggests the market is encountering resistance, while the low of $1.35044 marks an immediate support zone. Traders should watch these levels closely, as a decisive break could set the stage for a continuation or reversal.

Although the RSI value is unavailable, the MACD reading at -0.00295 indicates weak bearish momentum. The negative MACD suggests sellers slightly outweigh buyers, though the absence of the signal line makes cross-verification difficult. Combining this with price action around the SMA, it appears XRP is consolidating near critical support, with limited directional conviction. Caution is warranted for aggressive entries until the indicators clarify the short-term trend.

Key support lies around $1.3500, reinforced by recent intraday lows, while immediate resistance is near $1.3625–$1.3680, coinciding with the SMA and recent highs. A sustained move above $1.3680 could trigger renewed buying interest, potentially opening a path toward $1.38–$1.39. Conversely, a break below $1.3500 may accelerate downside momentum, targeting $1.34 or lower. Monitoring volume alongside price action will be essential to confirm any breakout or breakdown.

For trading strategies, conservative traders may consider waiting for a clear trend confirmation, ideally a break of support or resistance with accompanying volume. Short-term scalpers could exploit the narrow $1.350–$1.368 range using tight stop losses. Swing traders may prepare to buy near support with a target near the SMA, or short on a confirmed breach below $1.3500. Maintaining risk discipline is critical, given the current consolidation and mixed signals from technical indicators.
